title: Shares of Swiss Sneaker Company On Jump as It Posts 32% Sales Growth
text: On Holding shares jumped following Q2 2025 earnings that showed 32% sales growth, raising full-year outlook. The company reported net sales of CHF 749.2 million, representing strong momentum in both wholesale and DTC channels. Gross profit margin continued to expand to 61.5%, and adjusted EBITDA margin reached 18.2%. The company raised its full-year guidance, now expecting at least 31% net sales growth on constant currency basis, up from previous 28% target. Gross profit margin guidance was raised to 60.5-61.0%. The strong Q2 performance and raised guidance drove positive market reaction, with investors rewarding On's ability to sustain growth while expanding margins. The results validated the company's strategic initiatives including the Zendaya partnership and international expansion.
